steps: $H_0$: $H_0(S^1) \otimes H_0(\mathbb{R}P^2) = \mathbb{Z} \otimes \mathbb{Z} = \mathbb{Z}$. No Tor from degree $-1$. So $H_0 = \mathbb{Z}$.

$H_1$: Tensor part: $H_0 \otimes H_1 \oplus H_1 \otimes H_0 = \mathbb{Z}\otimes\mathbb{Z}/2 \oplus \mathbb{Z}\otimes\mathbb{Z} = \mathbb{Z}/2 \oplus \mathbb{Z}$. Tor part (from degree 0 pairs): $\operatorname{Tor}(\mathbb{Z}, \mathbb{Z}) = 0$. So $H_1 = \mathbb{Z} \oplus \mathbb{Z}/2$.

$H_2$: Tensor part: $H_0 \otimes H_2 \oplus H_1 \otimes H_1 = \mathbb{Z}\otimes 0 \oplus \mathbb{Z}\otimes\mathbb{Z}/2 = 0 \oplus \mathbb{Z}/2$. Tor part: $\operatorname{Tor}(H_0(S^1), H_1(\mathbb{R}P^2)) = \operatorname{Tor}(\mathbb{Z}, \mathbb{Z}/2) = 0$. So $H_2 = \mathbb{Z}/2$.
$H_3$: all tensor products vanish; Tor: $\operatorname{Tor}(H_1(S^1), H_1(\mathbb{R}P^2)) = \operatorname{Tor}(\mathbb{Z}, \mathbb{Z}/2) = 0$. So $H_3 = 0$.
